offer: For fleet accountants managing 5–15 vehicles, inaccurate fuel usage reporting causes financial discrepancies. We streamline fuel tracking and reconciliation instead of manual processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for fleet accountants
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows

Community forums for sharing tools among accountants

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
